name: Franco/Guide
intro: Franco is know for his 1st skill or ( Iron Hook ) and the ability to give Suppression effect from his Ultimate skill ( Bloody Hunt ). His ability to hook enemy make Franco annoying packing the Specialty of Crowd Control. Franco also have a ability to regenerate his HP and make his movement speed 10% faster because of his passive Wasteland Force . So here are some Cons and Pros about Franco :
